name: com.trollerbk/mcp
title: TrollerBk
description: MCP server for US business bankruptcy market intelligence: filings, case search, market summaries, EIN lookups, docket and document access, and personalized custom subscriber reports. Authentication required.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer <API token>. Obtain via trollerbk.com subscription. Also supports X-API-Key and X-Client-Email + X-API-Key.
